SEARCH
Package qsim.gui

Class PresentedData

java.lang.Object
qsim.gui.PresentedData
Direct Known Subclasses:
CrowdPresentedData
abstract class PresentedData extends Object
Used to plot the crowd-againts-time curve

  • Method Details

    • makeGraphTitle

      public String makeGraphTitle()
      Produces a brief description of the graph, to be displayed above it

    • paintPlot

      public abstract void paintPlot(Graphics2D g2d, Dimension bounds, boolean fromGUI, Qsim _qsim)
      Not supported in the parent class; children must implement

    • paintPlot

      public void paintPlot(Graphics2D g2d, boolean fromGUI, Qsim qsim)
      Paints the frontier (and any auxiliary data) on a specified Graphics2D object.
      Parameters:
      fromGUI - This value should be true if feedback (user's ability to click on nodes etc.) should be enabled, as opposed to simply producing a PNG/SVG image file.

    • getRecommendedDim

      public Dimension getRecommendedDim()

    • setRecommendedDim

      public void setRecommendedDim(Dimension d)

    • drawGrid

      protected static AffineTransform drawGrid(Graphics2D g2d, Dimension bounds, double realWidth, double realHeight, String title, boolean web)
      Draws a suitably spaced grid for the argument range [0:realWidth] x [0:realHeight]
      Parameters:
      g2d - this is where we draw
      realWidth - the range of time to display on the plot
      realHeight - the range of the crowd size to display on the plot
      Returns:
      the AffineTransform object which can be later use to convert the positions of individual plot points to the screen coordinates
